queue.task: Review yesterday (1000 tests, lambda calculus, RISC-V backend). Assess bugs found (SMT conflicting bounds, type-inference resetFresh). Set direction.
queue.summary: Reviewed yesterday: 1000 tests, 2 bugs (SMT conflicting bounds, type-inference resetFresh). Queue is well-ordered — bugs first, then type checker integration, then lambda extensions. No queue modifications needed.

queue.goal: Fix 2 bugs found yesterday: SMT solver conflicting bounds + type-inference resetFresh collision
queue.summary: Planned 2 BUILD tasks: fix SMT conflicting bounds in simplex, fix type-inference resetFresh collision. Context files identified.

queue.task: Fix SMT solver conflicting bounds bug — simplex assertBound/check not detecting infeasible bounds, add tests
queue.summary: Fixed both bugs. SMT: strict inequalities now adjust bounds (x<n→x<=n-1, x>n→x>=n+1), 6 new tests. Type-inference: freshVar uses t_ prefix to avoid collision, Subst.apply guards self-reference. 267 tests passing.

queue.task: Fix type-inference resetFresh collision — fresh var naming causes infinite recursion in instantiate, add tests
queue.summary: Already completed as part of T3 (both bugs fixed together).

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard check, email scan, GH notifications
queue.summary: Git pushed. Dashboard regenerated. GH notifications: 30+ neural-net CI failures (since Apr 12). No urgent emails.

queue.task: Reflect on bug fixes. Consider RISC-V GC vs monkey-lang type checker priority.
queue.summary: Reflections captured. Priority: monkey-lang type checker > RISC-V GC (bridges 2 projects). SMT bug lesson: strict→non-strict needs bound adjust for integers. Type-inf lesson: namespace fresh vars to avoid collision.

queue.goal: Monkey-lang type checker — connect type-inference project to monkey-lang compilation pipeline
queue.summary: Monkey-lang already has type annotations in AST (paramTypes, returnType). Need to build checker module using Algorithm W. Planned 2 BUILD tasks: core type checker + pipeline integration.

queue.task: Build monkey-lang type checker module: walk AST, infer types using Algorithm W, check annotations, report errors. Core types: int, bool, string, array, hash, fn. 20+ tests.
queue.summary: Built monkey-lang type checker: Algorithm W inference, parse type annotations (fn(x: int) -> int), 31 tests, all 1365+ existing tests pass. Added -> token to lexer, paramTypes/returnType in parser.

queue.task: Integrate type checker into compilation pipeline: run before compile/eval, flag --typecheck, type error formatting. 10+ integration tests.
queue.summary: Integrated type checker into REPL with --typecheck flag. Type errors reported before compilation. 14 integration tests. Backward compatible — annotations parsed but not enforced without flag.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard regen, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git pushed all 4 repos. Dashboard regen (running). Knowledge system updated (algorithm-w scratch note). monkey-lang added as embedded repo warning — needs submodule setup later.

queue.task: Mid-day reflection. Depth check. Review type checker quality.
queue.summary: Depth check passed (surprises + learning). Type checker quality: 45 tests, missing loops/match/enum/modules. Decision: stress-test type checker before building new features (depth > breadth).

queue.goal: Lambda calculus extensions — dependent types or effect system
queue.summary: Planned CoC (Calculus of Constructions) as natural next step on lambda cube. 2 BUILD tasks: core CoC implementation + proof terms for Curry-Howard.

queue.task: Build Calculus of Constructions (CoC): dependent types, Pi types, type-level computation. Parser + evaluator + type checker with bidirectional typing. 30+ tests.
queue.summary: Built Calculus of Constructions: Pi types, dependent typing, bidirectional type checking, natElim, Church booleans, parser. 43 tests. Completes lambda cube: untyped→STLC→SystemF→CoC.

queue.task: Add proof terms for Curry-Howard with CoC: natural number proofs, vector length proofs, existential types. Connect to existing curry-howard module. 15+ tests.
queue.summary: CoC proof terms: Leibniz equality (refl, symm), sigma types, addition/double proofs, IsZero predicate, Vec type. Fixed natElim motive sort flexibility. 22 tests.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard regen, email check
queue.summary: Git pushed all repos. Monkey-lang and workspace pushed. Dashboard updates.

queue.task: Afternoon reflection. Evaluate lambda calculus extensions. Plan evening exploration.
queue.summary: 12 tasks complete. Depth check passed. Plan: stress-test CoC, then RISC-V GC if time. Quality strong.

queue.goal: Fix SMT solver conflicting bounds bug + extend SAT solver tests
queue.summary: Already completed in T3 (SMT strict inequality fix + tests).
Skipped — parent plan T14 already done in T3.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard regen
queue.summary: Already pushed in T12. Skipping duplicate maintain.

queue.task: Dependent type theory — CoC, LF, Idris/Agda type systems
queue.summary: Explored dependent type theory extensions. Key insight: inductive types are the most impactful next step — auto-generated eliminators for user-defined types. Also: universe hierarchy, pattern matching, termination checking.

queue.task: Research inline caching and hidden classes in V8 — compare with monkey-lang shapes
queue.summary: Monkey-lang already implements V8-style hidden classes + IC (mono/poly/mega). Transition caching exists. Missing: store ICs (only reads are cached). Architecture is solid.

queue.task: Stress-test monkey-lang type checker: edge cases, error paths, complex programs, find bugs
queue.summary: Stress-tested type checker: found 2 bugs (let-polymorphism missing — id used with int then string failed; negate-string silently passing). Fixed both. Added let-polymorphism with proper generalization. 51 unit + 14 integration = 65 tests.

queue.goal: PLAN: Design RISC-V garbage collector — root scanning, GC safe points, heap organization
queue.summary: Planned RISC-V GC: Cheney semi-space copying collector. 3 BUILD tasks: object headers, core GC, stress tests. Currently bump-only, heap at 0x10000.

queue.task: Add object headers to heap allocations (tag word: type tag + size). Needed for GC to walk the heap. Update alloc, string, array, closure, hash allocators. 15+ tests.
queue.summary: Added GC object headers to all RISC-V heap allocations. Tags: STRING=1, ARRAY=2, HASH=3, CLOSURE=4, FORWARD=F. Header at ptr-4, backward compatible. 208 codegen tests pass, all other test suites pass.

queue.task: Implement Cheney semi-space copying GC: root scanning (registers + stack), copy-and-forward, pointer update. Trigger on alloc when half-space full. 20+ tests.
queue.summary: Implemented Cheney semi-space copying GC: host-assisted via ecall 200, root scanning (registers+stack), copy-and-forward, forwarding pointers. GC trigger in _alloc when from-space full. All 208+ tests pass.

queue.task: Stress-test GC: allocation-heavy programs, circular closures, long-lived vs short-lived objects. Fix bugs. 10+ tests.
queue.summary: 13 GC stress tests: allocation pressure, survival (long-lived vars, closures, arrays), correctness (fibonacci, push, string concat), edge cases. All pass.

queue.task: THINK: Design RISC-V tail call optimization — detect tail position calls, reuse frame. Review recursive patterns in monkey-lang.
queue.summary: RISC-V already has basic self-recursive TCO (return f(args)). Gaps: implicit tail position, if-else branches, mutual recursion. Most impactful: implicit tail position + if-else.

queue.task: Extend monkey-lang type checker: handle while/for loops, match expressions, enum types. Improve error messages. 20+ tests.
queue.summary: Extended type checker with 15+ new AST handlers: while, for-in, match, ternary, range, slice, try/catch, array comprehension, enum, destructuring. 64 unit + 14 integration = 78 tests.

queue.task: Stress-test extended type checker: complex programs with while/for/match/try, edge cases, find bugs
queue.summary: Stress-tested extended type checker: 14 complex patterns (fib+match, accumulator, nested match, while+break, try/catch, comprehension, etc). No bugs found. Ternary chain is parser issue, not type checker. 79 total tests.

queue.task: Add inductive type declarations to CoC: user-defined types with auto-generated eliminators. Support Bool, List, Maybe as examples. 15+ tests.
queue.summary: Inductive types for CoC: Bool, Maybe, Either, List, Pair, Unit, Void. Church-encoded with auto-generated constructors. List fold: sum [1,2,3]=6, length=3. Pair projections work. 24 tests, all 89 CoC tests pass.

queue.task: Prove theorems using CoC + inductive types: boolean algebra laws, list append properties, Maybe functor. Tests that ARE proofs.
queue.summary: 28 verified theorems: De Morgan laws, boolean distributivity/absorption, nat associativity/commutativity/distributivity, list append+identity, Maybe functor laws, equality proofs via Curry-Howard. All 113 CoC tests pass.

queue.task: Full test sweep: run ALL test suites across monkey-lang and lambda-calculus. Triage and fix anything broken.
queue.summary: Full test sweep: 0 failures across ~1,671 tests (945 monkey-lang across 27 files + 726 lambda-calculus across 14 files). Everything clean.

queue.task: Build algebraic effects system: effect signatures, handlers, state/exception/nondeterminism effects. Based on Plotkin-Power-Pretnar theory. 20+ tests.
queue.summary: Algebraic effects system: Perform/Handle with EffectSignal propagation. Handlers: runExcept, runState, runNondet, runLog. 28 tests. Found equality bug (undefined===undefined was true). All 141 lambda-calculus tests pass.

queue.task: Build mini proof assistant: interactive proof mode with tactics (intro, apply, exact, induction, refl). Uses CoC + inductive types as foundation. 20+ tests.
queue.summary: Mini proof assistant: 9 tactics (intro, intros, exact, refl, assumption, simpl, induction, trivial, unfold). Proves polymorphic identity, K combinator, equalities. 23 tests. All 164 lambda-calculus tests pass.

queue.task: Integrate monkey-lang type checker with RISC-V compiler: type-check before compilation, verify typed programs produce correct output. 10+ integration tests.
queue.summary: Type-checked RISC-V integration: 12 tests. Pipeline: type-check → strip annotations → compile → run. Typed fib, factorial, closures all pass. Type errors are advisory (gradual typing). Type-unsafe code crashes at runtime.

queue.task: Stress-test proof assistant: prove non-trivial theorems (modus ponens, transitivity, function composition type). Extend apply tactic if needed. 10+ proofs.
queue.summary: 7 non-trivial proofs: modus ponens, transitivity, composition, S combinator, double negation intro, eq reflexivity, 1+1=2. 30 total proof assistant tests. All 171 lambda-calculus tests pass.

queue.task: Build proof assistant REPL: interactive command loop, pretty-printed goals, tactic history, definition display. Runnable via node repl.
queue.summary: Proof assistant REPL: colorized output, context-sensitive prompt, commands for all tactics. Tested with identity proof. Runnable interactively or via pipe.

queue.task: Add type system for algebraic effects: effect rows, handler typing, effect polymorphism. Type-check effect programs. 15+ tests.
queue.summary: Effect type system: effect rows, handler typing, propagation. Effect signatures for State/Exn/Nondet/Log. 27 tests. Handler removes handled effects, preserves unhandled. All 198 lambda-calculus tests pass.

queue.task: Add type-directed optimization pass to monkey-lang: specialize arithmetic when types are known, skip tag checks, inline constants. Measure performance improvement. 10+ tests.
queue.summary: Type-directed AST optimizer: constant folding ((2+3)*(4+1)→25), strength reduction (x*0→0, x*2→x+x), dead branch elimination (if(true)→then). 27 tests.

queue.task: Stress-test effect type system: complex programs, edge cases, handler composition. Find bugs.
queue.summary: Stress-tested effect type system: 8 complex programs (nested handlers, handler composition, effect chains, multi-effect, full handling). No bugs found. 35 total effect type tests.

queue.task: Build linear type system: types with use-exactly-once semantics, affine/relevant/linear modalities, resource tracking. Rust-inspired ownership model. 20+ tests.
queue.summary: Linear type system: 4 modalities (linear/affine/relevant/unrestricted). Usage tracking, Rust-like ownership, use-after-move detection, resource management patterns. 26 tests. All 232 lambda-calculus tests pass.

queue.task: Build session types: typed communication protocols, send/receive/choice/offer, protocol compliance checking. Inspired by Honda-Yoshida-Carbone. 15+ tests.
queue.summary: Session types: typed communication protocols. Send/Recv, Select/Offer, recursive protocols. Duality is involutive. Compliance checker for action sequences. Examples: request-response, calculator, counter, ATM. 26 tests. 258 lambda-calculus tests total.

queue.task: Build gradual type system: dynamic type (?), consistent subtyping, blame tracking, runtime casts. Connects static and dynamic typing. 15+ tests.
queue.summary: Gradual types: ? type, consistency, blame tracking, runtime casts, meet/join lattice. 46 tests. All 304 lambda-calculus tests pass. 17 modules in the PL theory library.

queue.task: Build Algorithm W step-by-step tracer for monkey-lang: show each unification, substitution, and generalization step. Useful for debugging and education. 10+ tests.
queue.summary: Algorithm W tracer: step-by-step visualization of type inference. Shows INFER, UNIFY, SUBST, GENERALIZE, INSTANTIATE, ERROR steps. 13 tests. formatTrace() for human-readable output.

queue.task: Build refinement types: types with logical predicates ({x:Int | x > 0}), subtyping via SMT-like constraint checking, basic verification. 15+ tests.
queue.summary: Refinement types: {x:Int | x>0}, predicate subtyping, value verification, function contravariance. 33 tests. All 337 lambda-calculus tests pass. 18 PL theory modules.

queue.task: Build row polymorphism: extensible records with row types, field access/extension/restriction. TypeScript-like structural typing. 15+ tests.
queue.summary: Row polymorphism: extensible records, row types, structural subtyping, unification. 22 tests. 359 lambda-calculus tests. 19 PL theory modules.

queue.task: Build delimited continuations: shift/reset operators, CPS transform, answer type modification. Connect to effects. 15+ tests.
queue.summary: Delimited continuations (shift/reset). CPS evaluator, first-class continuations, encodes exceptions+state+nondet. Classic test 2*shift(k=>k(3)+k(5))=16. 22 tests. 381 lambda-calculus tests. 20 PL modules.

queue.task: Improve monkey-lang match type inference: infer types from literal patterns, bind pattern variables with correct types, check exhaustiveness. 10+ tests.
queue.summary: Match type inference: pattern-based scrutinee narrowing (int/string/bool/null/array patterns). Variable bindings, wildcard support. 68 total type checker tests.

queue.task: Final quality pass: run all tests across all projects, verify counts, fix anything broken. Final git push.
queue.summary: Final quality pass: all tests pass across all 5 projects. ~1,967+ total tests. Zero failures. 44 tasks completed this session.

queue.task: Add intersection and union types to lambda-calculus: T1 & T2 (has both), T1 | T2 (has either). TypeScript-style. 15+ tests.
queue.summary: Intersection & union types: TypeScript-style. Full subtyping lattice, simplification, flow-sensitive narrowing. 32 tests. 413 lambda-calculus tests. 22 PL modules.

queue.task: Build higher-kinded types module: type constructors, Functor/Applicative/Monad typeclasses, kind system. 15+ tests.
queue.summary: Higher-kinded types: kind system (★, ★→★, ★→★→★), Functor/Monad typeclasses, 4 Functor instances, 3 Monad instances, all 6 monad laws verified. 28 tests. 441 lambda-calculus tests. 23 PL modules.

queue.task: DEPTH CHECK: Stress-test delimited continuations. Try to break shift/reset with nested resets, multi-shot continuations, continuation composition, recursive shift. Find at least 1 bug.
queue.summary: DEPTH CHECK passed: found and fixed multi-shot continuation bug (applyCPS for Cont discarded outer k). k(k(2)) gave 3 instead of 4. Added 11 stress tests. 32 total delimited continuation tests.

queue.task: MAINTAIN: Full test sweep of lambda-calculus — run every test file, verify exact pass counts, investigate any failures. Quality over breadth.
queue.summary: Full lambda-calculus sweep: 24 test files, ALL passing, 0 failures. Accurate count: 569 tests (was reporting 441). 117 TAP + 452 custom reporter.

queue.task: THINK: What would be the highest-value next focus? Consider: RISC-V tail calls, monkey-lang WASM improvements, stress-testing existing modules more, or something entirely new.
queue.summary: THINK: Decided to switch to RISC-V project for depth. Tail call optimization is highest-value: genuinely new territory (optimization pass in codegen), not more breadth. Also aligns with TODO.md.

queue.goal: PLAN: RISC-V tail call optimization. Detect tail-call position in monkey-codegen, emit jump instead of call+ret.
queue.summary: PLAN: Investigated RISC-V TCO — already fully implemented! Self-recursive tail calls, GCD, tail-recursive fib, mixed tail/non-tail all tested. Redirecting.

queue.task: Build a type-level computation module for lambda-calculus: type-level natural numbers, type-level lists, type-level booleans with computation at the type level (Peano arithmetic). 15+ tests.
queue.summary: Type-level computation: Peano arithmetic, lists, Vec (length-indexed), FizzBuzz at type level. 48 tests. 617 lambda-calculus tests. 25 PL modules.

queue.task: Build monkey-lang LSP-lite: hover info showing inferred types for any expression. Use typechecker to annotate AST, then query by position. 10+ tests.
queue.summary: Type info provider: LSP-like hover showing inferred types. TypeAnnotator, getTypeInfo, formatHover. 14 tests.

queue.task: Build monkey-lang control flow graph (CFG): extract basic blocks from AST, build CFG with edges for branches/loops, compute dominators. 12+ tests.
queue.summary: CFG builder: basic blocks, dominators (iterative fixed-point), immediate dominators, natural loop detection, DOT export. Found ConstStatement bug (class doesnt exist). 16 tests.

queue.task: Build dead code elimination pass for monkey-lang using CFG: find unreachable basic blocks, remove dead code after returns. 10+ tests.
queue.summary: Dead code elimination: removes code after return, constant-folds if(true/false), dead variable detection (assigned but never read). 13 tests.

queue.task: Build small-step semantics for lambda-calculus: step function showing each reduction step, trace all reductions to normal form. Connect to existing lambda.js. 12+ tests.
queue.summary: Small-step semantics tracer: 4 reduction strategies, divergence detection, strategy comparison. Key test: normal order succeeds where applicative diverges. 14 tests. 631 lambda-calculus tests. 26 PL modules.

queue.task: THINK: Review what I have built and decide on one deep dive that would make the lambda-calculus project genuinely impressive as a teaching resource. Something that connects multiple modules.
queue.summary: THINK: Decided to build effects-rosetta — same programs implemented via monads, algebraic effects, and delimited continuations, showing they are the same thing. Connects HKT, effects, and delimited modules.

queue.task: Build effects-rosetta: same programs (exceptions, state, nondeterminism) implemented 3 ways: monads, algebraic effects, delimited continuations. Show equivalence. 15+ tests.
queue.summary: Effects Rosetta Stone: 4 programs × 3 encodings (monads, algebraic effects, delimited continuations). Proven equivalent. 23 tests. 654 lambda-calculus tests. 27 PL modules.

queue.task: Build monkey-lang liveness analysis using CFG: compute live variables at each program point, use for register allocation hints. 10+ tests.
queue.summary: Liveness analysis: backward dataflow, dead assignment detection (with intra-block fix), interference graph. Fixed dead-assignment bug where intra-block uses were missed. 11 tests.

queue.task: Build SSA form conversion for monkey-lang: rename variables so each is assigned exactly once, insert phi nodes at CFG join points. 12+ tests.
queue.summary: SSA form: Cytron algorithm, phi node insertion, variable renaming. Pipeline now: AST → CFG → SSA → Liveness → DCE. 11 tests.

queue.task: Build SSA constant propagation: sparse conditional constant propagation (SCCP) on SSA form. Propagate constants through phi nodes. 10+ tests.
queue.summary: SSA constant propagation: SCCP with lattice (⊤→Const→⊥), worklist algorithm, chained propagation (x=2,y=x*3=6,z=y+1=7). Full pipeline: AST→CFG→SSA→ConstProp→Liveness→DCE. 13 tests.

queue.task: Build lambda-calculus abstract machine: CEK machine (Control, Environment, Continuation). Shows how lambda calculus is actually executed on hardware. 12+ tests.
queue.summary: CEK abstract machine: environment-based eval with explicit continuations. Fixed eval() double-dispatch bug. Closures, recursion (5!=120), Church encoding. 22 tests. 676 lambda-calculus tests. 28 PL modules.

queue.task: Build monkey-lang escape analysis: determine which variables/closures escape their scope (can be stack-allocated vs heap-allocated). Use with CFG. 10+ tests.
queue.summary: Escape analysis: stack vs heap allocation. Closure escape propagation, free variable detection, conservative argument handling. 11 tests.

queue.task: Build abstract interpretation for lambda-calculus: sign analysis (Pos/Neg/Zero), interval analysis, and constant analysis. Show how abstract domains approximate computation. 12+ tests.
queue.summary: Abstract interpretation: Sign, Interval, Constant domains. Generic abstract interpreter. 24 tests. 700 lambda-calculus tests. 29 PL modules.
